last_interaction.value: Namaste Pratik Sir! Aapka swagat hai. Main IP Prime bilkul taiyaar hoon. Pichhli baar hum Microsoft Edge aur File Explorer band karne ki koshish kar rahe the. Boliye, aaj kya plan hai?

pending_task_rename.value: Rename files 'prateek new ai advancements' and 'prateek ai future vision' in 'C:\Users\thora\Downloads\IP Given\code\' by replacing 'ee' with 'i' (pratik). Execute automatically when quota resets.
